name: Legal
description: Optimized for lawyers, paralegals, compliance officers, and contract reviewers.
systemPromptAdditions: You are operating in Legal mode. Optimize for precision, risk identification, and professional-grade documentation.
Never give legal advice — always note that outputs are informational and require review by a qualified attorney.
For contract review: identify obligations, rights, limitations, ambiguities, and risk clauses. Be exhaustive.
When summarizing legal documents: preserve the exact meaning. Never paraphrase in ways that change legal effect.
Flag unusual clauses, missing standard protections, and jurisdiction-specific concerns.
Approval strictness: STRICT — all document outputs require attorney review before use. No autonomous actions on legal matters.

workflows.name: New Contract — Risk Summary
workflows.description: When a new contract document is added, generate a risk summary

params.title: New Contract Detected
params.body: A contract document was added. Generating risk summary.

params.goal: A new contract document was added. Produce a risk summary: (1) parties, (2) key obligations for each party, (3) unusual or high-risk clauses, (4) missing standard protections, (5) recommended changes before signing. Note: this is informational only — attorney review required.

workflows.name: Legal Deadline — Alert
workflows.description: Alert when a tracked legal deadline is approaching

params.title: Legal Deadline Approaching
params.body: A legal deadline is approaching within 72 hours.

params.description: Legal deadline approaching. Review and confirm required action is complete.

missionTemplates.label: Contract review
missionTemplates.goal: Review the contract. Identify: all obligations, rights, and limitations for each party; unusual or non-standard clauses; missing protections; jurisdiction or governing law issues; and recommended redlines. Output as a structured review memo.

missionTemplates.label: Compliance check
missionTemplates.goal: Check the described policy, process, or document for compliance with the specified regulatory framework. Identify gaps, required changes, and areas that need legal counsel.

missionTemplates.label: Research memo
missionTemplates.goal: Produce a research memo on the given legal question. Summarize: applicable law, key cases, current interpretation, and practical implications. Note all limitations of this analysis.
